summary: Iteration 46: Leave & Availability System + Top Selling Toggle - All features verified. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - Heva Ops Time Off page with Requests/Availability tabs, Leave Request dialog, Admin Dashboard workforce section, Shift Scheduler with leave blocks overlay.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: leave.py: POST /api/leave-requests creates leave with pending status, notifies admins
leave.py: Overlapping leave detection works correctly (400 error)
leave.py: PUT /api/leave-requests/{id}/approve changes status to approved, notifies staff
leave.py: PUT /api/leave-requests/{id}/decline changes status to declined, notifies staff
leave.py: DELETE /api/leave-requests/{id} allows staff to cancel pending requests only
leave.py: PUT /api/availability/my saves recurring availability rules
leave.py: GET /api/scheduler/blocks returns nested dict {staff_id: {date: {block_type, reason}}}
reports.py: GET /api/reports/today?sort_top_by=quantity sorts by quantity descending
reports.py: GET /api/reports/today?sort_top_by=revenue sorts by revenue descending (default)
StaffTimeOff.js: Requests and My Availability tabs working correctly
StaffTimeOff.js: Leave request dialog with Type, Start/End Date, Note fields
HevaOpsLayout.js: 5 tabs in bottom nav - Shifts, Clock In, Time Off, Swaps, Pay
ShiftScheduler.js: Leave blocks overlay showing 'Vacation' text on approved leave dates
AdminDashboard.js: Leave Requests widget with Approve/Decline buttons (when pending requests exist)
seed_data_creation: Test leave requests created with TEST_ prefix in notes, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified Leave & Availability System and Top Selling Toggle. All backend endpoints working: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/leave-requests, GET /api/leave-requests/pending, PUT /api/availability/my, GET /api/availability/my, GET /api/scheduler/blocks. Frontend verified: Heva Ops Time Off page with Requests/Availability tabs, Leave Request dialog, 5-tab bottom nav, Shift Scheduler shows leave blocks as greyed cells with 'Vacation' text. Top Selling toggle on dashboard works but only visible when there are sales (today had £0.00). Admin Dashboard Leave Requests widget shows pending requests with Approve/Decline buttons.

leave_request_crud.evidence: POST creates pending request, GET returns staff's own requests, admin sees all, DELETE cancels pending

leave_approval_workflow.evidence: PUT /approve changes status to approved, PUT /decline changes to declined, notifications sent

overlapping_leave_rejection.evidence: 400 error returned when creating overlapping leave request

availability_rules.evidence: PUT /api/availability/my saves rules, GET returns saved rules

scheduler_blocks.evidence: GET /api/scheduler/blocks returns {staff_id: {date: {block_type, reason}}} with hard/soft/pending_leave types

top_selling_toggle.evidence: GET /api/reports/today?sort_top_by=quantity and sort_top_by=revenue both work correctly

heva_ops_time_off_page.evidence: Requests and My Availability tabs, + Request button, leave request dialog with all fields

heva_ops_5_tabs.evidence: Bottom nav has Shifts, Clock In, Time Off, Swaps, Pay tabs

shift_scheduler_leave_blocks.evidence: Approved leave shows as greyed cells with 'Vacation' text on scheduler grid

admin_dashboard_leave_widget.evidence: wf-leave-requests widget exists with approve-leave-{id} and decline-leave-{id} buttons

login_admin.evidence: SKAdmin login returns access_token, dashboard loads

login_staff.evidence: user login returns access_token, Heva Ops layout loads
